calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Paul Valdez, self represented plaintiff appeared. Plaintiff stated he intends to file a dismissal. The Court vacates sanctions imposed. The Order to Show Cause is off calendar.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2022 Continued To Feb-28-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to February 28, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: G.Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

*** Plaintiff Paul Valdez arrived after hearing and the judge has left the bench. No written sanctions issued. ***
